name: ChkStart_LINMasterBaudrateViolation
title: ChkStart_LINMasterBaudrateViolation
description: Checks the LIN Master baud rate, by analyzing frame headers.
An event will be generated, if the measured baud rate is outside of the specified range. The expected baud rate is taken from DB.

parameters.name: ClockTolerance
parameters.description: Allowed Master clock tolerance. Measured baud rate expected to be in the range: B – B*aClockTolerance/100 <= M <= B + B* aClockTolerance/100; where M is measured baud rate and B is expected baud rate [specified in DB] Unit: percents [%]

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
